Find out here Climate Facts Matter Learn more News News article 29 April 2026 Europe’s warming accelerates beyond global trend, new Copernicus data shows Europe is warming faster than the global average, with impacts already felt across the continent. New Copernicus data highlights rising heat, drought and extreme events: a stark reminder that accelerating climate change demands urgent and sustained action now. 1 min read News article 23 April 2026 Global ozone and climate experts meet in Brussels under Montreal Protocol Global experts under the Montreal Protocol have met in Brussels to assess technologies and financing needs to protect the ozone layer and cut powerful greenhouse gases, helping shape the next phase of international action. 1 min read News article 22 April 2026 Commission proposes actions to protect Europeans from the fossil energy crisis and accelerate the shift to clean, homegrown energy Commission proposes new measures to shield Europeans from fossil fuel price shocks while accelerating the shift to clean, homegrown energy. 1 min read See all news Events 20-21 May 2026 Expert meetings Carbon Removals and Carbon Farming “CRCF” Days 19 Jun 2026 Conferences and summits Innovation Fund: Stakeholder Consultation Event on the IF26 Calls for Proposals Brussels, Belgium Live streaming available See all events Highlights European Climate Law Adaptation and resilience to climate change Clean Industrial Deal ETS2: buildings, road transport and additional sectors Innovation Fund Road transport International action on climate change Climate disinformation Share this page
